raw_consumer_statement:
Good day. 

I have struggled with American Express to properly investigate my dispute claim on a product I didn't receive. I have asked to speak with the dispute team and I have been told by the representative that they don't have any access to reach them. As a client I have a right to have my dispute claim investigated in a thorough manner. This is not happening with American Express. I have sent overwhelming evidence that I didn't receive my vacuum cleaner from XXXX. American Express focused on a tracking number that XXXX had submitted and their final decision was enough proof that I indeed received the vacuum. 

I contacted XXXX and asked them to look up the tracking number XXXX. Upon their review, they told me my name, address nor product was not associated with that number. I have submitted that information into my dispute claim file at American Express. Again, I do not feel that American Express is investigating my case appropriately. I reached out to XXXX via XXXX and they again gave me the same above tracking number for my order. I told them this was an invalid tracking number for me. I was disconnected from XXXX. I have submitted all this information to American Express. 

I have been charged {$830.00} for an item I never received. I need an advocate for me to help me as I have justified in more ways than XXXX that I never received my vacuum. I am asking for someone to reach out to American Express, XXXX and XXXX on my behalf. I am asking for someone to reach out to me so I know someone is listening. 

I appreciate your time and help with this matter. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
